Customer & Transaction Details

Provide client registration parameters

Choose Product Classification

Commercial Trailer

Heavy duty freight haulage platforms including flatbed chassis, container flats, and tipper semi-trailers.

Tipper dumper body

Extreme mining and infrastructure hauling box bodies, rock dumpers, and custom hydraulic aggregates.

Rigid Load Body

Heavy cargo truck carrier containers, open payload trays, and flat frames for multi-axle commercial rigids.

Choose Sub-product Template

Flat Bed Trailer

Standard 40ft triple-axle flat container flatbed for standard dry cargo.

Side Wall Trailer

Standard payload side gate trailer for bag cargo and local freight.

Tip Trailer

Semi-trailer dump chassis for massive sand/aggregate transport.

Box Body Tipper

Standard square box dumper for coal, sand, and aggregate haulage.

Rock Body Tipper

Deep-V shape rock body with thick wear-resistant lining for hard mining.

28 Feet Load Body

Standard rigid frame tray for multi-axle freight carrier trucks.

30 Feet Load Body

Extended frame rigid body for express payload cargo shipping.

Select Volumetric Payload Capacity

Choose volume in CBM. Default specifications load automatically per volume model.

14 CBM
16 CBM
18 CBM
23 CBM
25 CBM
Custom

Customize Vehicle Specs

1. Steel Sheets & Material Grade
Section Required
2. Structural Chassis & Suspension
Section Required
3. Tipping Hydraulics & Cylinder Kit
Section Required
4. Primer, Coatings & Finishing Colour
Section Required
5. Fitted Accessories & Safety Marker Lights
Section Required
6. Product Dimensions (Feet/Inches)
Section Required

7. Client Requested Custom Modifications

Attach secondary accessories, custom paint jobs, or branding Winch lines request here.

8. Custom Spec Sections

Add reusable custom spec sections (e.g. electrical system, additional body options). These persist and are available for all products.

REF:- NEXFRA-QTN/2026/001
DATE: 23.07.2026
GST NO: 33AAICN0679H1ZD
To,
M/s VIJAYSHREE MOTOR WORKS PVT LTD
Plot #16 &17, shankalapur ind area, Pb road
Hospet, KA-583201
GST NO: 29AAICV1602L1Z4
Subject: Quotation for -EICHER 6035XPT , 25-CBM TIPPER BOX BODY with sub frame and Hydraulic Kit
Dear Sir,
We thank you for your enquiry and its Our pleasure to forward you an offer as below:
# Description Qty BASIC/UNIT-RATE Total
1 25 CBM TIPPER BOX BODY WITH SUBFRAME and CYLINDER KIT Regular TAIL DOOR EICHER-6035XPT 1 No’S
GST 18% 		6,48,306/-
1,16,694/- 		6,48,306/-
1,16,694/-
TOTAL AMOUNT 7,65,000/- 7,65,000/-
Amount in words:- Seven lakh Sixty-five thousands only

Specifications of Work:

NEXFRA MANUFACTURING INDIA PVT.LTD.

No 835/1C Kalamangalam Road, Near Aggondapalli, Hosur, Krishnagiri

Tamil Nadu - 635110, India.

CIN NO- U29100KA2022PTC57647

Email: nexfra.india@gmail.com Web: www.nexfra.in

Scope of Work:
As Mentioned above
Painting:
Epoxy Primer with PU Paint two coats each,
Transport:
Customer or Dealer Scope
Terms & Conditions:
  • 1) Validity – 15 days
  • 2) Delivery – 2 To 3 weeks from Date of receipt of purchase order and advance payment
  • 3) Freight - Ex Price Hosur,.. Transportation in Customers Scope & is not considered in the above Price
  • 4) Warrantee: Standard warranty against manufacturing defects of 12 Months from the date of delivery. Consumables, Glass & Rubber parts are not covered under the standard warranty
  • 5) Taxes - All taxes & duties will be billed at actual applicable rates, at the time of billing
  • 6) Payment terms – 50% advance and balance Prior to Delivery
  • 7) Inspection: By Nexfra and share the report along with invoice
BANK DETAILS :-

We hope our offer is in line with your requirement and we assure your our best product and services, We await for your valuable purchase order to execute the same.
